cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure this out. So the question is about when Anthony could have gone to the amusement park, right? The amusement park is closed after 10pm. Let me go through each clue step by step. First, Anthony woke up at 6am. Then Leslie saw him reading at the library from 6am to 8am. So that's 6-8 am. Then Jennifer saw him working out at the gym from 8am to 9am. So that's 8-9 am. Then Anthony saw Anthony buying cookies at a bakery from 2pm to 9pm. Wait, that seems like a long time—2pm to 9pm. And then William saw Anthony buying a bike at the bike shop from 9pm to 10pm. And the amusement park closed after 10pm. So we need to find the time when Anthony wasn't doing any of these activities, right? Let me lay out the timeline. From 6am to 8am: at the library.
